title: South Dakota — Federal Standards Apply
summary: South Dakota has no state overtime, meal break, rest break, or predictive scheduling laws beyond the federal FLSA baseline. Federal rules apply.

requirements.description: No state-level scheduling requirements beyond federal FLSA. See federal regulations for applicable rules.

notes: South Dakota follows the federal Fair Labor Standards Act for overtime, breaks, and scheduling matters. Employers must comply with federal FLSA requirements but face no additional state-level scheduling obligations.
